---
name: Re-score request
about: Disagree with an existing entry's score? Open a re-score request with evidence.
title: "[rescore] <entry name>"
labels: rescore
---

## Entry

<!-- Copy the exact `name` from `data/entries.json` -->

## Bit you think is wrong

<!-- Pick one: metric_named, value_given, dataset_named, dataset_hash, model_version_pinned, threshold_direction, sample_size, seed_published, pre_registered -->

## Current value

<!-- 0 or 1 -->

## Proposed value

<!-- 0 or 1 -->

## Evidence

<!-- Quote the exact text from the canonical public source, with a link.
     Screenshots are accepted but a quotable text excerpt is preferred. -->

## Counter-considerations

<!-- Optional. Anything that argues against your proposed change? -->

---

By opening this issue you agree that the score is heuristic and re-scoring is a normal part of the workflow. We re-score on receipt of evidence; we do not re-score on argument alone.
